description: CompositionYellow shirt made of 100% cotton, with blue stripes, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and with a mid-sleeve buttoned flap, buttoned front placket with brand embroidery on the left chest, tipped collar and curved hemline FittingComfort Wash careMachine wash in warm waterWash only with like coloursUse mild detergentDo not bleachDry under shadeUse warm iron Stylish to the hilt, this striped shirt from spykar is a great addition to your wardrobe. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and suede shoes to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
